title: Making recruitment more predictable
subtitle: The goal is to make recruitment more predictable: less blind spending, more control over your real cost per integration.
pppTitle: PPP (Pay Per Performance) — our flagship model
pppSubtitle: Three variants, one principle: you choose the performance level at which payment is triggered.
packsSubtitle: For specific needs (rare languages, non-agent profiles, or recurring use), packs can complement the PPP.
faqSubtitle: Everything you need to understand the logic.
ctaTitle: Ready to optimize your recruitment costs?
ctaSubtitle: Request access to discover the details of our models and simulate your budget.
